name: Jock Studio
description:
[MLM]
While well-known for sports, Olympus University hosts plenty of other extra-curricular activities as well... including the former film club, which has been transformed into the secret 'Jock Studio'.

As you were walking around the university's central lobby, finding a club to join as you weren't in one, you were approached by a film senior who insisted you join his club, Jock Studio. What exciting and mysterious events await inside there?

Characters from Jock Studio game by BLits. More about the game HERE. (The game is still in development.)

Disclaimer: The LLM you're using might decide to be goofy and cause some errors like repetition, misgendering, speaking for user, etc. which are out of my control. This bot has more than one character which is like adding fuel to the fire ijbol.

Note: Another bot that I copied from my old bot that I created months ago. The initial message was inspired by the game's first demo. But instead of meeting each member individually, everyone is present at the club. Since the creators confirmed that the second demo and the main game will have different introductions, I'll most likely create new bots specifically for each of them. Sometimes, the bot confuses the characters' years, majors, and sports so you might need to remind the bot or put it in your messages when needed.

Update 9/5/25: Adjusted the characters' height and weight based on Demo 2.1
(supposedly to be the official height and weight)

Update 17/1/26: Added lorebooks for info on the university and the club + word fixes
creator: caramelon
